name: golang-github-shopify-sarama-dev
title: golang-github-shopify-sarama-dev
description:
Go library for Apache Kafka
Sarama is a Go client library for Apache Kafka (https://kafka.apache.org/)
version 0.8 (and later).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-shopify-sarama-dev because Go library for Apache Kafka.

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-shopify-sarama-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-shopify-sarama-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
